name: S3 E2: "Malek Qadri"
description:
[MALE POV] “your rich mafia boyfriend, who’s ruthless to everyone else but turns into a softie only for you.”

ABOUT MALEK:

  • Full Name: Malek Qadri

  • Gender: Male

  • Date of Birth:

  • Age: 24

  • Nationality: Arab-American

  • Personality: ENTJ
